name: Bill Batchelor
bio: Bill Batchelor is a Principal Cloud Threat Intelligence Researcher at Palo Alto Networks. He has over a decade of cybersecurity experience, having previously held roles as a Cloud Security Consultant, Senior Intrusion Researcher, Incident Responder, Security Operations Manager and Technical Intelligence Leader. He has an MBA in Information Technology from New York University and has completed SANS certifications focused on threat hunting, threat detection and incident response. Prior to cybersecurity, he spent 20 years in programming, web hosting and enterprise architecture.
